--- insert_on_conflict_do_update_alias.sql
INSERT INTO foo AS f (x, y) VALUES (1, 2) ON CONFLICT (x) DO UPDATE SET y = f.y + 1
--- AST
&ast.Insert{
  TableName: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  As: &ast.AsAlias{
    As:    16,
    Alias: &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 19,
      NameEnd: 20,
      Name:    "f",
    },
  },
  Columns: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 22,
      NameEnd: 23,
      Name:    "x",
    },
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 25,
      NameEnd: 26,
      Name:    "y",
    },
  },
  Input: &ast.ValuesInput{
    Values: 28,
    Rows:   []*ast.ValuesRow{
      &ast.ValuesRow{
        Lparen: 35,
        Rparen: 40,
        Exprs:  []*ast.DefaultExpr{
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 36,
              ValueEnd: 37,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "1",
            },
          },
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 39,
              ValueEnd: 40,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "2",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  OnConflict: &ast.OnConflict{
    On:             42,
    ConflictTarget: &ast.ConflictTargetColumns{
      Lparen:  54,
      Rparen:  56,
      Columns: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 55,
          NameEnd: 56,
          Name:    "x",
        },
      },
    },
    ConflictAction: &ast.ConflictActionDoUpdate{
      Do:          58,
      UpdateItems: []ast.UpdateItem{
        &ast.UpdateItemSetValue{
          Path: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 72,
              NameEnd: 73,
              Name:    "y",
            },
          },
          DefaultExpr: &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.BinaryExpr{
              Op:   "+",
              Left: &ast.Path{
                Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                  &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 76,
                    NameEnd: 77,
                    Name:    "f",
                  },
                  &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 78,
                    NameEnd: 79,
                    Name:    "y",
                  },
                },
              },
              Right: &ast.IntLiteral{
                ValuePos: 82,
                ValueEnd: 83,
                Base:     10,
                Value:    "1",
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
INSERT INTO foo AS f (x, y) VALUES (1, 2) ON CONFLICT (x) DO UPDATE SET y = f.y + 1
